summary: Production smoke test against https://comunipy.netlify.app/ (Netlify deploy). All 10 requested flows validated end-to-end. 30+ assertions passed, ZERO console errors and ZERO pageerrors across every role/tab. Landing + ROI Calculator + LoginScreen (4 profiles) + AdminDashboard (15 menu items) + ResidenteDashboard (pago SPI + votaciones) + TrabajadorDashboard (turnos/liquidaciones) + SuperAdminDashboard (dark neon) + localStorage persistence (F5 keeps session) + logout (clears session and returns to landing) all working exactly as in preview.

integration_issues.issue: pay-modal opens and pay-confirm-btn closes it correctly, but the success toast text was not captured by common selectors ([role=status], [class*=toast]). The modal does close, so functionality works — likely the toast uses a custom transient element or disappears very fast. Not a blocker, only cosmetic verification gap.

action_items: OPTIONAL: on logout, `localStorage['comunipy.session.v1']` becomes `{"userId":null,"showLogin":false}` instead of being fully removed. Functionally correct (session is cleared), but if the intent was 'localStorage limpio' as literally stated in the spec, consider `localStorage.removeItem('comunipy.session.v1')` on logout for a cleaner state.
OPTIONAL: add data-testid='success-toast' or role='status' to the toast rendered after pay-confirm-btn to make it E2E-verifiable.

OPTIONAL: nav-testids use hyphenated Spanish (nav-cómo-funciona) which is already fine — spec listed 'nav-cómo funciona' with a space that would break selectors. Also, the 'Contacto' header link does not carry a data-testid (nav-contacto) — add it for symmetry.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard refactor into /src/components/admin/*.tsx (14 files) verified in production — no broken imports, no missing chunks on Netlify.
localStorage persistence works reliably: {"userId":"u2","showLogin":false} survives F5 and restores the correct dashboard.

ROI Calculator (Landing) is fully reactive: mutating any of the 3 range inputs (units/fee/morosidad) via dispatched 'input'+'change' events updates roi-ahorro in real time (₲ 3.983.000 → ₲ 13.735.000 → ₲ 15.310.000 → ₲ 27.910.000 across the 3 slider mutations).
SuperAdmin dashboard preserves dark neon aesthetic in production (rgb ink-900 background + green/teal accents visible on /transacciones and /sistema tabs).
test_credentials: 4 demo profiles clickable on LoginScreen — no password: u1 SuperAdmin (Carlos), u2 Admin (María), u3 Residente (Roberto), u6 Trabajador. All verified in prod.
seed_data_creation: One vote cast (vote-v1-v1-o1) and one SPI payment confirmation on Residente. All in local component state, no persistence beyond the session key.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production URL is https://comunipy.netlify.app/ — pure frontend, no backend, state in useState + localStorage['comunipy.session.v1']. Persistence works across F5. Verified data-testids in prod: landing-page, nav-perfiles, nav-módulos, nav-cómo-funciona (hyphen NOT space), nav-beneficios, nav-roi, header-login-btn, roi-inputs, roi-input-units, roi-input-fee, roi-input-morosidad, roi-output, roi-ahorro, roi-cta-btn, login-screen, login-profile-u1/u2/u3/u6, login-back-btn, hamburger-open/close/drawer/overlay, logout-btn, admin-dashboard (NOW present in prod), residente-dashboard, trabajador-dashboard, superadmin-dashboard, menu-item-<id> (15 items on admin), pay-method-spi/tigo/personal/transfer, pay-modal, pay-confirm-btn, vote-v1-v1-o1..o3. For range-slider driven state (ROI), use native setter + input+change dispatchEvent pattern — Playwright's fill() won't trigger React's onChange. For hamburger drawer items, prefer document.querySelector(...).click() via page.evaluate to bypass fixed-drawer viewport clipping.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; all requested features verified working in production.
